docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-08-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK MURRAY. PLAINTIFF GARY SHIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA TWEEDIE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HER HUSBAND WILLIAM TWEEDIE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK MURRAY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY SHIU, GARY TWEEDIE, CHRISTINA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHIU, GARY AS TO DEFENDANT TWEEDIE, CHRISTINA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) HUSBAND FOR WIFE (WHO IS PRESENT TOO) FILED BY DEFENDANT TWEEDIE, CHRISTINA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-30-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TWEEDIE, CHRISTINA
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY SHIU, GARY AS TO DEFENDANT TWEEDIE, CHRISTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SHIU, GARY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHIU, GARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TWEEDIE, CHRISTINA $2,925.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,990.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $1800 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE & $1125 FOR LOSS OF USE. TOTAL DEFENDANT TO PAY $2925 PLUS COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TWEEDIE, CHRISTINA
